task_completion.description: Navigate to the workers management page in Ekylibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser URL bar contains '/backend/workers' or the Ekylibre interface shows the 'Workers' list page.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new worker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'New Worker', 'Add Worker', or similar is visible in the Ekylibre interface.
The name 'Marie' is typed into the first name input field on the worker creation form.
The name 'Dupont' is typed into the last name input field on the worker creation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the worker's date of birth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '1992-06-15' (or equivalent format like '15/06/1992' or 'June 15, 1992') is typed or selected in the date of birth input field.

task_completion.description: Save the form and verify the worker was successfully registered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the worker was created is visible, OR 'Marie Dupont' is visible in the workers list or worker detail view.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to register the worker.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Ekylibre GUI, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl, rails console) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine Ekylibre application interface, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to manually insert 'Marie Dupont' into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL for managing workers in Ekylibre is '/backend/workers'. The expected worker details to verify are: First Name: 'Marie', Last Name: 'Dupont', Date of Birth: '1992-06-15' (June 15, 1992).
